title: Tillandsia cathcartii
taxonomy: Tillandsia cathcartii is a species of air plant in the family Bromeliaceae. Tillandsia cathcartii is a type of epiphyte that is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of South America. Tillandsia cathcartii is a member of the genus Tillandsia, which consists of over 650 species of air plants. This species is known for its unique ability to absorb moisture and nutrients from the air. Tillandsia cathcartii is a popular choice among air plant enthusiasts due to its striking appearance and low-maintenance requirements.
